step_rationale: ADTRP effector inhibiting monocyte adhesion via phosphoinositide-3-kinase signaling; suppresses leukocyte tethering.
mechanism: PIK3R3 downstream of ADTRP inhibits monocyte-endothelial adhesion and recruitment, suppressing plaque-destabilizing inflammation.

references.title: Androgen inhibits key atherosclerotic processes by directly activating ADTRP transcription.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
